series_metadata.series_description: The Assessment Scores record indicates the test results of individual questions given on a test. The Assessment Scores are used to identify areas in which students have difficulty and need to improve overall quality of the course.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The Information is to be retained on the BWC (LMS) Learning Management System until the BWC employee no longer an active employee with BWC. ; Paper: Once the record is scanned into the (LMS) Learning Management System, hold for 30 days for quality assurance then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
